title: Pancakes
instructions: Mix all ingredients into a smooth batter. Heat a pan and pour small amounts. Cook for 2 minutes on each side.

title: Pasta Chicken Salad
instructions: Grill the chicken and cut it into pieces. Mix with vegetables and season with olive oil and salt.

title: Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Cook spaghetti. Fry bacon. Mix eggs and cheese, then combine everything while pasta is hot.

title: Chocolate Cake
instructions: Mix dry and wet ingredients separately, then combine. Bake at 180°C for 40 minutes.

title: Omlette
instructions: Beat eggs, pour into pan, add fillings, fold and cook until done.

title: Beef Stew
instructions: Sear beef chunks. Add chopped vegetables and broth. Simmer on low heat for 2 hours until tender.

title: Chocolate Brownies
instructions: Melt chocolate and butter. Stir in sugar and eggs, then fold in flour. Bake at 180°C for 25 minutes.

title: Vegetable Stir Fry
instructions: Chop vegetables into small pieces. Sauté in a hot wok with oil, ginger, and soy sauce for 10 minutes.

title: Creamy Mushroom Risotto
instructions: Sauté onions and mushrooms. Add rice and toast slightly. Gradually add warm broth, stirring constantly until absorbed. Finish with butter and parmesan.

title: Apple Pie
instructions: Make the dough and chill. Slice apples and mix with sugar and cinnamon. Line a tin with dough, fill with apples, and cover with more dough. Bake at 190°C for 45 minutes.

title: Guacamole Dip
instructions: Mash avocados in a bowl. Squeeze lime juice, add minced garlic and salt. Stir in chopped cilantro and serve with chips.

title: Salmon with Asparagus
instructions: Place salmon and asparagus on a baking sheet. Drizzle with oil and season. Top with lemon slices and bake at 200°C for 15-20 minutes.
